exam_prep.description: Competitive exam preparation — extracts formulas, MCQ questions, shortcuts and topic concepts

project_build.description: Learning a skill to build something — extracts concepts, tools, code patterns, project ideas

quiz_practice.description: Regular practice drilling — heavy focus on MCQ extraction and scheduled quizzing
